title: Jelly Animated Hero
description: Hero section with gradient text, background glow, a background video loop, and a product screenshot image. Features AOS zoom animations and uses Next.js Image and Link. Minimal layout, dark aesthetic.
prompt_text:
# Jelly Animated Hero Hero section with gradient text, background glow, a background video loop, and a product screenshot image. Features AOS zoom animations and uses Next.js Image and Link. Minimal layout, dark aesthetic. ## Use when - Building a dark SaaS or product landing page hero with gradient headline and product screenshot. - Delivering a first-load reveal with a background video loop for ambient motion. - Showcasing a product with a visually striking gradient hero and CTA. - Emphasizing a value proposition above the fold with a clean, dark-themed layout. ## Stack - Framework: react - Libraries: next, lucide-react - Requires: tailwind ## Install ```bash next, lucide-react ``` ## Component — jelly-animated-hero.tsx ```tsx import { ArrowUpRight } from "lucide-react"; import Image from "next/image"; import Link from "next/link"; export default function FUIHeroWithJelly(){ return (

{/* Hero image */}
); } ``` ## Demo ```tsx import FUIHeroWithJelly from "@/components/ui/jelly-animated-hero"; export default function FUIHeroWithJellyDemo() { return ; } ``` ## Notes - Uses `data-aos` attributes which require the AOS (Animate On Scroll) library to be initialized in the app root. Install `aos` and call `AOS.init()` in a client component. - Imports `Image` and `Link` from `next/link` and `next/image` but uses a plain `` tag for the hero screenshot — not a Next.js Image component. Works in non-Next.js projects if `next` import is removed and `Link` is replaced with ``.
